report.summary: Standup v9 ~19:06 CET — all 6 agents ran since v8 (18:13); publish-v6 cleared queue (MegaETH + Abstract Chain live, 289→290 pages, deploy G1aoYkoba); build run-10 scaffolded Babylon Protocol BTC Staking + BabylonYieldEstimator component; design-v8 three-pass deep polish (16 new OGs, 12+ a11y fixes, TradingViewChart skeleton); community-v11 set Sprint 58 Bloomberg Screener Live narrative + Mon–Fri posting schedule; eod-v6 confirmed 290 pages stable, /api/health + /api/cache-stats added, Vercel trial 7 days; build 1b4a15e apostrophe fix still unpatched (9h+).

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v8 (~18:13 CET)
items: 📄 PUBLISHED (publish-v6, 18:18): /learn/megaeth-guide + /learn/abstract-chain-guide promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Deploy G1aoYkoba triggered. All QA checks passed (page.tsx ✅, metadata ✅, OG ✅, JSON-LD ✅). PUBLISH_QUEUE cleared (depth → 0). Page count: 289 per publish-v6.

🏗️ Build run-10 (18:29): Babylon Protocol Bitcoin Staking guide scaffolded (~3,200w, 9 min read, Intermediate). BabylonYieldEstimator.tsx interactive component built — 3 APY scenarios (0.5%/0.85%/1.2%), BTC amount/lock period/price inputs, zero external deps. 3-schema structured data (Article + HowTo + FAQ). Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. QUEUE depth: 1 (/learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking).

🎨 Design-v8 (18:39): Three-pass deep a11y + visual polish. Pass 1: 12 a11y fixes across EcosystemStore/HomeContent/learn guides. Pass 2: 10 more a11y fixes (role=switch/tab, progressbar ARIA, Stargate/Uniswap/Lido responsive hero). Pass 3: TradingViewChart shimmer skeleton loading state (affects all 84 ecosystem pages), Lido + EigenLayer breadcrumbs upgraded to Breadcrumb component with JSON-LD BreadcrumbList, DCA Calculator touch targets 40px→44px + responsive grid. 16 new OG images: ecosystem-store, courses, gamification, airdrops, quiz, tools, exchanges, wallets, learn, investing, defi-lending, taxes, dca-calculator, portfolio-tracker, staking-apy + 3 PNG conversions.

📣 Community-v11 (18:48, filed as 2026-03-16): Sprint 58 Bloomberg Screener Live Data as lead narrative ('we've been on mock data, that changes this week'). 6-post EIP-7702 thread drafted (24-day Pectra countdown, dumb→smart wallet UX, protocol adopters). GENIUS Act + Meme Launchpads drop content for Wed. April 15 tax 30-day countdown. Full Thursday newsletter drafted. 2 social cards: social-bloomberg-screener-live.svg + social-eip-7702-smart-accounts.svg. Posting schedule Mon–Fri locked.

📊 EOD-v6 (18:57): Production stable at 290 pages (CORRECTED — v5 misreported megaeth/abstract-chain as queued when already published). QUEUE: 1 item (/learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking). NEW: /api/health (rate-limited) + /api/cache-stats routes added. 2 new pillar pages in middleware (solana-alpenglow-guide + onchain-finance-onfi-guide, s-maxage=86400). Vercel Pro trial: 7 days remaining (-1 day vs v8). 57 TS errors unchanged — no regression.

🔍 GSC Day 17: Inside the critical organic indexing window (14–21 days). Bloomberg Screener Sprint 58 live data integration perfectly timed — switching from mock data just as organic evaluators may be crawling. Rate limiting still 0/6 public data routes — live threat window.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/megaeth-guide — MegaETH real-time L2 guide (100K TPS, Feb 2026 mainnet). Live via G1aoYkoba.
PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/abstract-chain-guide — Abstract Chain consumer ZK rollup guide (Pudgy Penguins). Live via G1aoYkoba.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking — Babylon Protocol BTC staking guide ($1.9B TVL, 57K BTC staked). BabylonYieldEstimator component. QA-ready. QUEUE depth: 1.

SHIPPED 🎨 Design-v8 deep polish — 16 OG images created and wired, 12+ a11y fixes, TradingViewChart skeleton on all 84 ecosystem pages, Breadcrumb JSON-LD on Lido + EigenLayer, DCA responsive grid + touch targets.

OPEN 🔴 Build error 1b4a15e — STILL UNPATCHED at 9h+. Root cause confirmed: unescaped apostrophe in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 (`you're` in single-quoted JSX string). 1-character fix unblocks Sprint 59 ecosystem/courses routes (176 dApps, courses hub). No programmer cycle ran to fix it post-confirmation — critical delay.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting — 0/6 public data routes wired. /api/health is the only rate-limited endpoint. GSC Day 17 organic window + Sprint 58 live data integration = rising live bot-attack risk.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel Pro trial — 7 days remaining. Billing action required from Jefe.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Fallback data: 1/6 routes (market-dominance only). prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields unprotected on cold cache failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100/290 published slugs missing page.tsx — triage audit still pending.

CARRY-OVER 🟡 57 TS errors across 2 files — AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17, from apostrophe) + structured-data.examples.ts (40, pre-existing). No regression, but apostrophe file will cascade on build.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 10 new OG images from design-v8 need metadata wired in their respective page.tsx files.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked.

SPRINT 58 STATUS: 0% — DeFiLlama Live API (Bloomberg Screener V3), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend all not started. Community-v11 Sprint 58 narrative staged and ready to post Monday pending deploy.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 IMMEDIATELY. This apostrophe has been identified-but-unpatched for 9+ hours across multiple standup cycles. The fix is one character: change `you're` to `you're` or `you\'re` in the single-quoted JSX string. Every additional cycle without this fix is a choice to keep Sprint 59's 176 dApps + courses hub off production. Assign to Programmer as the first and only task for the next build cycle. Do not let it coexist with new content work again.

PRIORITY 2 — Start Sprint 58 DeFiLlama Live Integration. Bloomberg Screener V3 is the highest-traffic tool on degen0x and is running mock data on Day 17 of organic indexing. Community-v11 has pre-staged the 'Live Data is here' Monday tweet and Discord post — this is a hard deadline. The Sprint 58 DeFiLlama live feed must go live before Monday's social push, otherwise the announcement lands before the product is ready. Assign Data Engineer + Programmer in parallel on the Bloomberg Screener route (/api/defi-yields full integration into Screener component).

PRIORITY 3 — Wire rate limiting across all 6 public data routes. The pattern exists in /api/health (checkRateLimit). Copy it to /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. Day 17 organic window means real traffic could be arriving today. An unrated API route hit by a scanner or bot while simultaneously integrating live DefiLlama data is a double failure mode — rate limiter is the insurance policy.
